{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent has successfully reframed the problem, identifying the load-bearing concept and proposing a tighter framing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "The agent has clearly articulated the novelty of their work, mapping against relevant prior works and identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "RX.1": "The agent has marked confidence for each recommendation and identified missing evidence, demonstrating transparency in uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no drift or scope adherence issues.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, with no regressions or introduction of new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change in the output is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating high provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.92,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent has successfully reframed the problem, identifying the load-bearing concept and proposing a tighter framing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: The agent has clearly articulated the novelty of their work, mapping against relevant prior works and identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: The agent has marked confidence for each recommendation and identified missing evidence, demonstrating transparency in uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), with no drift or scope adherence issues.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, with no regressions or introduction of new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change in the output is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating high provenance and traceability.
